keyEvents.text: Goal! Argentina 0, Egypt 1. Yasser Ibrahim (Egypt) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Marwan Attia with a cross following a corner.
Penalty saved. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Mostafa Shobeir (Egypt).
Substitution, Egypt. Hamdi Fathy replaces Emam Ashour because of an injury.
Substitution, Argentina. Nico González replaces Nicolás Tagliafico.
Substitution, Argentina. Lautaro Martínez replaces Rodrigo De Paul.
Goal! Argentina 0, Egypt 2. Mostafa Zico (Egypt) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Haissem Hassan following a fast break.
Substitution, Argentina. Gonzalo Montiel replaces Nahuel Molina.
Substitution, Egypt. Trezeguet replaces Haissem Hassan because of an injury.
Goal! Argentina 1, Egypt 2. Cristian Romero (Argentina) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi with a cross.
Substitution, Egypt. Omar Marmoush replaces Mostafa Zico.
Goal! Argentina 2, Egypt 2. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Gonzalo Montiel.
Goal! Argentina 3, Egypt 2. Enzo Fernández (Argentina) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lautaro Martínez with a cross following a fast break.
Mostafa Shobeir (Egypt) is shown the yellow card.
Hamdi Fathy (Egypt) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Argentina. Facundo Medina replaces Julián Alvarez.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Otamendi replaces Cristian Romero.
Substitution, Egypt. Zizo replaces Mohanad Lasheen.
Marwan Attia (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Haissem Hassan (Egypt) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Switzerland. Djibril Sow replaces Ardon Jashari.
Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Denis Zakaria (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Luis Suárez (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Colombia. Juan Fernando Quintero replaces James Rodríguez.
Substitution, Colombia. Jaminton Campaz replaces Jhon Arias.
Substitution, Switzerland. Miro Muheim replaces Ricardo Rodríguez.
Substitution, Colombia. Richard Ríos replaces Jefferson Lerma.
Substitution, Colombia. Cucho Hernández replaces Luis Suárez.
Substitution, Switzerland. Silvan Widmer replaces Denis Zakaria.
Substitution, Switzerland. Cedric Itten replaces Breel Embolo.
Substitution, Switzerland. Rubén Vargas replaces Dan Ndoye.
Davinson Sánchez (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Switzerland. Zeki Amdouni replaces Fabian Rieder.
Miro Muheim (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Colombia. Yerry Mina replaces Jhon Lucumí because of an injury.
